description:
Remove Privacy, Terms, and FAQ Links from Footer

Remove the footer section that contains links to Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and FAQ pages.

Requirements:
- Locate the footer component in the codebase
- Identify and remove the specific section/container with Privacy, Terms, and FAQ links
- Preserve any other footer content (copyright, social links, contact info, etc.)
- Ensure footer layout adjusts properly after removal (no empty spaces or broken styling)
- Verify the change across different screen sizes and devices
- Confirm the actual policy/terms/FAQ pages themselves remain accessible if needed elsewhere
title: Remove Privacy, Terms, and FAQ footer links
